name: AVEVA Industrial Software API
what_it_does: AVEVA (Schneider Electric) REST APIs for industrial software platform covering SCADA, MES, historian, and process simulation. Enables AI agents to manage real-time plant process data retrieval from AVEVA Historian and PI-compatible time series databases, handle SCADA system alarm and event data for operational monitoring, access manufacturing execution system (MES) production order and batch data, retrieve asset performance and OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) analytics data, manage predictive maintenance and equipment health data from AVEVA Asset Performance Management, handle digital twin simulation data for process optimization, access energy management and carbon footprint tracking for industrial sustainability, retrieve quality management and SPC (Statistical Process Control) data, manage plant information management and document control data, and integrate operational technology (OT) data with IT systems, ERP, and analytics platforms.
use_cases: Retrieving real-time process data from industrial monitoring agents
Analyzing OEE metrics from manufacturing performance agents
Monitoring equipment health from predictive maintenance agents
Integrating OT data with IT systems from industrial IoT agents
not_for: Commercial building automation without industrial process and OT focus
Enterprise IT applications without operational technology integration needs
Consumer IoT without industrial SCADA and process control context
best_when: An oil & gas, chemicals, or manufacturing company using AVEVA industrial software wants AI agents to automate process monitoring, OEE analytics, predictive maintenance, and OT/IT data integration.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: AVEVA controls industrial process automation systems with safety implications — automated SCADA commands without safety interlock validation and process engineer review can cause process upsets, equipment damage, or safety incidents. Industrial process control changes must follow Management of Change (MOC) procedures. Historian data for safety-critical analysis requires certified engineer review.

auth.notes: AVEVA uses OAuth 2.0 via AVEVA Connect identity platform. Developer portal at developer.aveva.com. AVEVA acquired by Schneider Electric (2023). AVEVA Connect is cloud platform for SCADA, Historian, and MES data. On-premise AVEVA products also available. SDKs for Python and JavaScript. Webhooks for process events. Cambridge, UK origin.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription per product
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per AVEVA product (Historian, MES, APM, etc.); AVEVA Connect cloud subscription
pricing.notes: Cambridge, UK. AVEVA founded 1967. Acquired by Schneider Electric (2023). Industrial software market. 20,000+ industrial customers globally. Strong in oil & gas, chemicals, power, and food & beverage. AVEVA Connect cloud platform launched 2020. Competes with Aspentech and Emerson for industrial software market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; varies by data volume and product

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: SCADA command automation requires safety interlock validation and Management of Change (MOC) procedure compliance; process control automation without safety review causes process upsets
OT/IT network segmentation — AVEVA on-premise systems are often on isolated OT networks; cloud API requires AVEVA Connect gateway installation with appropriate OT/IT firewall rules
Historian time-series patterns — AVEVA Historian uses time-series data model with tag-based organization; understand plant tag hierarchy before querying process data
Schneider Electric acquisition — AVEVA acquired by Schneider (2023); product roadmap and API evolution under Schneider ownership; verify current API status and documentation
OPC/UA protocol layer — AVEVA on-premise products communicate via OPC-UA; cloud API abstracts this but understanding OPC-UA data model helps with data interpretation
Real-time vs. historian data — process SCADA real-time data and historian archived data have different endpoints, latency, and retention; verify data recency requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Industrial software and OT. SOC2, IEC62443, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Process control and industrial operations data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Industrial OT software. SOC2, IEC62443, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Process control and operational data.
